name: Cofina, SGPS, S.A.
summary: Cofina, SGPS, S.A. engages in the publication of newspapers and magazines in Portugal. The company offers newspapers, including Correio da Manha, a daily newspaper; Record, a daily sports newspaper; Jornal de Negocios, an economic newspaper; and Destak and Mundo Universit√É¬°rio, which are free newspapers. It also provides magazines, such as S√É¬°bado, TV Guia, Flash, and M√É¬°xima. In addition, the company offers online newspapers, classifieds, and magazines; and graphic printing services. Further, it operates portals, including flash.pt, loja.xl.pt, passatempos.xl.pt, and xl.pt; broadcasts cmTV, a cable television channel; and Nossa Aposta, an online gaming platform. Additionally, the company is involved in the production and creation of websites for online business development; organization and promotion of events; and newspaper printing services. The company was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Porto, Portugal.
